name: BestBuyMonitor
short: Monitor Best Buy products for restock alerts
description: Tracks Best Buy product pages and posts to a Discord channel when items come back in stock. Supports configurable alert channel, ping target (everyone/here/role), check interval, and per-product watchlists.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Best Buy product URLs, SKUs, and stock status per guild.
author: you
install_msg:
Thanks for installing BestBuyMonitor!

Get started:
1. `[p]bbm setchannel #your-channel`
2. `[p]bbm setping everyone` (or a role, or none)
3. `[p]bbm add <bestbuy product url>`

Type `[p]bbm` for all commands.
